independent_variables.variable_name: International anti-corruption agenda and legal-elite strategies
independent_variables.variable_description: Connections between prosecutors, judicial elites and international anti-corruption bodies.

dependent_variables.variable_name: Internationalization of the Public Prosecutor Office
dependent_variables.variable_description: Expansion and reorientation of Brazilian prosecutorial anti-corruption activism.

classification.brief_justification: O artigo "The Internationalization of the Brazilian Public Prosecutor’s Office: Anti-Corruption and Corporate Investments in the 2000s" apresenta argumento qualitativo explicativo com linguagem causal ou processual. Como não define estimando nem suposições de identificação, classifiquei o desenho como Other e a quantidade causal como FALSE.
